query: 规模最大的前一百只基金里，持仓贵州茅台最多的十只基金是谁

args.sql: WITH latest_size_date AS (SELECT MAX(date) AS size_date FROM fund_size), latest_hold_date AS (SELECT MAX(date) AS hold_date FROM fund_holding), top100_funds AS (SELECT fund_code, fund_name FROM fund_size WHERE date = (SELECT size_date FROM latest_size_date) ORDER BY fund_size DESC LIMIT 100) SELECT h.fund_code AS 基金代码, t.fund_name AS 基金名称, h.holding_value AS 持有市值, h.nav_ratio AS 占净值比 FROM fund_holding h JOIN top100_funds t ON h.fund_code = t.fund_code WHERE h.date = (SELECT hold_date FROM latest_hold_date) AND h.stock_name = '贵州茅台' ORDER BY h.holding_value DESC LIMIT 10;

plan.rationale: 先选出最新规模日期下规模最大的前100只基金，再在最新持仓日期下筛选这些基金持有贵州茅台的记录，按持有市值降序取前10。

notes: 规模日期取 fund_size 最新 date
持仓日期取 fund_holding 最新 date
规模前一百按 fund_size 降序
持仓最多按 holding_value 降序
贵州茅台对应 stock_name='贵州茅台'
先选出最新规模日期下规模最大的前100只基金，再在最新持仓日期下筛选这些基金持有贵州茅台的记录，按持有市值降序取前10。
SQL 由 LLM/规则生成，并经过只读白名单校验和 dry run。
